name: Heavenly Sinful Lemon Chiffon Pie
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 400°F. For crust, combine flour, 1/4 cup sugar, and 1 tablespoon grated lemon peel in a medium bowl. Cut in butter until mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Stir in egg yolk, vanilla, and 1 teaspoon lemon juice. Press evenly into a 9-inch pie plate; trim and flute the edge. Prick the dough and line with foil. Fill with dried beans, uncooked rice, or pie weights and bake for 10 minutes. Remove foil lining and weights; cool completely on a wire rack.
For filling:
Beat 4 egg yolks in a small bowl. Combine with 1/2 cup sugar, 1/3 cup lemon juice, 2 tablespoons grated lemon peel, and gelatin in the top of a double boiler. Cook over boiling water for 5 minutes or until thickened, stirring constantly. Remove from heat; beat egg whites and salt in a large bowl until soft peaks form. Gradually add remaining 1/2 cup sugar, beating until stiff and glossy. Fold white mixture into lemon mixture; pour into cooled crust. Refrigerate until set. Garnish with whipped cream and lemon peel.
